title: Spartan Weaponry: Twilight Forest
description: Addon mod for Spartan Weaponry that adds compatibility with The Twilight Forest.
body:
**
Adds new [Twilight Forest](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/the-twilight-forest) themed weapons and traits to [Spartan Weaponry](https://modrinth.com/mod/spartan-weaponry).
** ![](https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/31541291/193753112-5507bdd0-80b8-4a57-95f0-46e387c88704.png) ### Supported materials: - **Ironwood** - **Steeleaf** - **Knightmetal** - Armored Damage Bonus - +2.0 damage against armored foes - **Fiery** - Blazing - Sets foes on fire for 15 seconds ### Planned Updates: - Add 1.12.2 textures to 1.19.2+ for consistency with Twilight Forest - Backport newer features to 1.16.5 - Add weapons as dungeon loot in 1.16.5+

**
Get yourself a server with 15% off the first month at Kinetic Hosting with code KRELOX
** [![Kinetic Hosting Banner](https://onedrive.live.com/embed?resid=6BF544900F9867AE%2113808&authkey=%21AJZMCAdCdWoTprs&width=900&height=194)](https://tinyurl.com/kreloxkinetic)
